title: GGUF local quant coverage: Q4_K_M, Q8_0, Q4_1, UD-Q4_K_XL

change.summary: Broadened Qwen3.5 GGUF materialization/runtime coverage to the local Q8_0, Q4_1, and UD-Q4_K_XL files while preserving the existing Q4_K_M path.
implemented: registered public GGUF generator keys for gguf_q8_0, gguf_q4_1, and gguf_ud_q4_k_xl
added Q8_0 token-embedding lookup into BF16 hidden state
added registry-driven GGUF embedding dispatch for raw Q6_K/Q8_0 and dense BF16 fallback embeddings
added dense BF16 fallback materialization for GGUF Q4_1, F16, BF16, and IQ4_XS tensors
routed dense BF16 fallback projections through the registered dense_gemv BF16 kernel
added quant plugin metadata for gguf_q4_1 and gguf_iq4_xs
added E2E fixtures for Q8_0, Q4_1, and UD-Q4_K_XL
caveats: Q4_1, F16, BF16, and IQ4_XS projection support is a correctness-oriented dense BF16 fallback, not a promoted native throughput path.
Public full-model prefill remains token-serial until the linear-attention bulk scheduler path lands.

e2e_acceptance.command: for f in tests/fixtures/gguf/qwen35_0_8b_q4_k_m_e2e.json tests/fixtures/gguf/qwen35_0_8b_q8_0_e2e.json tests/fixtures/gguf/qwen35_0_8b_q4_1_e2e.json tests/fixtures/gguf/qwen35_0_8b_ud_q4_k_xl_e2e.json; do env HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_e2e_correctness.py --fixture $f --json /tmp/${f##*/}_task49_e2e.json; done

validation.targeted_tests_command: HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt python3 -m pytest tests/test_gguf_embedding_dispatch.py tests/test_gguf_linear_dispatch.py tests/test_model_quant_and_imports.py tests/test_gguf_e2e_acceptance.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_materialize.py tests/test_gguf_q6_k_embedding.py tests/test_llm_gguf_generate_path.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_runner.py tests/test_gguf_ops.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_full_attention_gpu.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_tokenizer.py tests/test_aotriton_discovery.py -q
validation.embedding_smoke_result: synthetic_q6_k_embedding max_abs=0.0; real_q6_k_token_embd max_abs=0.0; real_q8_0_token_embd max_abs=0.0; worst_max_abs=0.0
